seo.title: Return & refund policy
seo.description: SmartMall return and refund policy - clear, transparent, and designed to protect customer rights.

pageHeader.title: Return & refund policy
pageHeader.description: We are committed to a convenient shopping experience with a clear, flexible, and easy-to-follow return policy.

physical.title: Physical product return process
physical.noteDescription: Please keep the product in its original condition and pack it carefully before sending it back so we can process your request quickly.

request.title: Submit request
request.description: Send a request through the website or hotline

inspect.title: Inspect & process
inspect.description: Inspect the product and process the request

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: Exchange for a new product or issue a refund

online.title: Online service / account / software handling process
noteDescriptions: Some digital products, licensed software, digital accounts, and online upgrade services only support refunds or replacements when there is a system issue or the service cannot be used.
After a service has been activated successfully, some products are not eligible for refunds under the publisher's rules.

request.title: Submit support request
request.description: Contact us through the website, Zalo, or email

handle.title: Handle & respond
handle.description: Fix, reactivate, reissue the service, or refund when eligible

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: Close the request and confirm with the customer

conditions.title: Return conditions
acceptedPhysicalItems: Original packaging, labels, and accessories are included
A valid purchase invoice is available
The request is within the return period for that product type
The reason is valid, such as a technical defect, wrong item, or shipping damage
acceptedDigitalItems: Service or account has not been activated, or cannot be used due to a system issue
Account or license has not been used, or has a technical issue upon receipt
Wrong service package was delivered or purchased by mistake and has not been activated
rejectedPhysicalItems: Product has been used, soiled, or damaged by the user
Accessories, original packaging, or labels are missing
Underwear, cosmetics, products with opened seals, or products that have been tried
rejectedDigitalItems: Service has been activated or used successfully
Account or service has been transferred, gifted, or resold to another person
Terms of use were violated, or the account was locked/banned due to user behavior

categories.title: Return period by category
categories.description: The return period is counted from the delivery date and may vary by product group.
categories.extraDescription: Products in clearance sale programs may have shorter return periods.

electronics.specialNotes: Does not apply to activated software

fashion.specialNotes: Underwear and socks are not eligible for return

conditions: No allergy issue caused by use

books.specialNotes: E-books are not eligible for return

conditions: Wrong package delivered or purchased by mistake and not yet used
digitalServices.specialNotes: No refund/exchange after successful activation or usage. Not applicable when terms of use are violated or the account is locked due to user behavior.

reasons.title: Common return reasons
reasons.description: Common reasons customers choose when creating a return request.
reasons.cardDescription: Select this reason when creating a return request.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.description: Common questions about the return and refund process.

promotion.question: Can I return a promotional product?
promotion.answer: Yes, promotional products can be returned under the standard policy. However, the refunded amount will be the discounted price, not the original price.

shippingFee.question: Who pays the shipping fee for returns?
shippingFee.answer: If the issue is from us, such as a wrong item or defective product, we will cover the shipping fee. If the return is due to a change of mind, the customer covers the shipping fee.

exchangeUpgrade.question: Can I exchange for a higher-priced product?
exchangeUpgrade.answer: Yes, you can exchange for a higher-priced product by paying the price difference. We will calculate and notify you of the additional amount.

processingTime.question: How long does return processing take?
processingTime.answer: Usually 5-7 business days from the time we receive the product. During peak periods, processing may take 2-3 additional days.

cancelRequest.question: Can I cancel a submitted return request?
cancelRequest.answer: Yes, you can cancel before sending the product back. After the product has been shipped, cancellation depends on the processing status.

tips.takePhotos: Take photos of the product before packing
tips.keepPackaging: Keep the original packaging and accessories
tips.trackRequest: Track status with your request code

footerCta.title: Need more help?
footerCta.description: Our customer care team is ready to support you throughout the return and refund process.

requestModal.title: Create Return Request
requestModal.successContent: Your request code is RT2025080001. We will contact you within 24 hours.
requestModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product condition and specific reason...

tracking.estimatedDescription: Your request is expected to be completed within the next 2-3 business days.
